name: core.openwop.connections.notion
description: Notion connection pack (RFC 0095) — OAuth2 provider for Notion pages + databases. ADR 0033 DEPLOY-GATED. Reach is `mcp` against Notion's official first-party hosted MCP server (https://mcp.notion.com/mcp, Streamable HTTP), which searches/reads/creates/updates workspace content under the connected user's permissions. Notion consent is a static developer-portal capability set rather than per-request OAuth scopes (scopeModel `capabilities`). Carries NO secret; the operator supplies the OAuth client id/secret host-side (ADR 0024 §7).
